---
title: "Dookie2025 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
```

# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
# tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
```


```{r}
tar_load(df_observed_wide_harv)
tar_load(list_observed_dfs)
df1<-processed_met_data$data
info_3 <- tar_read(df_list_PCDS)

x<-info_3$pcds_3_emergPlants
tar_read(msg_obs_saved)
```
